context: D8 Goal 1 — decision ladder + completeness guard + verifier lens. Registered agents; maker notably applied the new counter-guard to its own return.

criteria.evidence: goal-maker.md L15-24: ladder intro + rungs 1-7 verbatim, ordered, justify-skips present.
criteria.refutation_attempted: Character-for-character comparison against canonical text; checked ordering and the justify-skips clause.

criteria.evidence: SKILL.md packet gains COMPLETENESS COUNTER-GUARD + completeness[] in RETURN EXACTLY; goal-maker.md return contract requires per-id satisfied/not-satisfied ('Do not return until every id is enumerated').
criteria.refutation_attempted: Confirmed the requirement exists in BOTH the packet template and the maker return format, gated before declaring ready.

criteria.evidence: goal-verifier.md L33-45: lens fails EITHER direction — (a) unrequested factory/config/plugin/abstraction layers, (b) YAGNI'd-away rubric-mandated edge/empty/error/validation states; dropped-input-validation/directory-traversal named canonical; 'Minimal-but-incomplete and complete-but-overbuilt both fail.'
criteria.refutation_attempted: Checked both directions present, not just over-engineering, and the canonical example named.

criteria.evidence: Classified from CODE independently of labels: overbuilt.py (ABC+registry+config+factory around a+b) -> fail over; missing_validation.py (join with no escape check) -> fail under; minimal_ok.py (realpath+commonpath guard, no abstraction) -> pass. Empirical: '../../etc/passwd' escapes BASE_DIR in missing_validation (True), REJECTED by minimal_ok.
criteria.refutation_attempted: Independent classification plus actually running the path logic in python; results match expected verdicts.

criteria.evidence: git status: only .md under .claude/agents|.claude/skills/goal-opus + .md/.py under the goal workdir; no settings.json, no hook config.
criteria.refutation_attempted: Enumerated every changed path against the allowed set; grepped for settings/hook files.

banned_outcomes.evidence: git diff on this goal's criteria.json empty; not in porcelain status.
SKILL.md diff is a single hunk inside Handoff packets; the four append-only sections (L242-290) untouched.
No .claude/settings*.json changes; diff grep for PreToolUse|hooks:|mcpServers found nothing.
